title: Become Financially Independent
description: Build sustainable wealth, passive income streams, and achieve long-term financial security.

children.title: Build Investment Portfolio
children.description: Establish a diversified asset allocation across equities, real estate, and fixed income.

children.title: Save & Invest ₹20L in Index Funds
children.description: Consistently invest monthly target into low-cost Nifty 50 and S&P 500 index funds.

children.title: Set up automated SIPs for monthly target
children.description: Configure auto-debit on the 1st of every month.

children.title: Create Emergency Reserve Fund
children.description: 6 months of living expenses parked in liquid instruments.

children.title: Open high-yield liquid mutual fund account

title: Get into Peak Physical Shape
description: Transform health, build functional strength, optimize cardiovascular stamina, and improve sleep quality.

children.title: Fat Loss & Metabolic Health
children.description: Reach target body fat percentage while building lean muscle mass.

children.title: Lower Resting HR below 65 BPM
children.description: Improve Zone 2 endurance and heart rate recovery.

children.title: Walk 8,000 steps daily
children.description: Track via wearable device every evening.

children.title: Zone 2 Cardio session 3x per week
children.description: 45 mins of cycling or jogging at 120-135 BPM.

children.title: Maintain 8 hours of sleep hygiene schedule
